title: CLAUDE.md
summary: Ecosystem agent constitution defining hard constraints and standing operational rules for the local-first SwiftUI HabitsTracker app within a 4-app DesignKit ecosystem.
scope: Data safety (Export/Import JSON, migration path, bundle/App-Group stability)
Design constraints (Balanced Luxury theme, semantic tokens, no hard-coded colors)
Testing expectations and RC smoke test
Session-derived rules (file size cap, schema migration, logging, sync, accessibility)
notes: Classified per MANIFEST_TYPE=DOC (authoritative override). Content corroborates: prose-heavy constitution carrying standing constraints and operational rules rather than a single locked decision (ADR), user-story requirements (PRD), or implementation contracts/schemas (SPEC). Precedence set to MANIFEST_PRECEDENCE=2.
